lineage_provenance.raw: octane mintz 28g (1 oz) octane mintz is a potent indica dominant strain (70% indica 30% sativa) born from the flavorful cross of sunset octane and wedding cake. this strain boasts a rich aroma profile that combines the earthy diesel notes of sunset octane with the sweet vanilla undertones of wedding cake. the result is a deeply relaxing and euphoric high that envelops the mind and body making it an excellent choice for unwinding after a long day. the effects come on strong providing a sense of calm and contentment while also stimulating the appetite often leading to a satisfying case of the munchies. beyond its recreational appeal octane mintz is also favored for its therapeutic benefits. its high potency makes it effective for alleviating symptoms of pain stress and insomnia. the strain's relaxing nature can help ease tension and promote restful sleep while its mood enhancing effects can provide relief from anxiety and stress. whether you're looking to relax relieve pain or simply enjoy a peaceful evening octane mintz offers a well rounded experience that caters to both the body and mind. flower type 1 flow gardens

sherbert thca flower essential 28g strain profile sherbert thca flower is an indica leaning hybrid in the iconic sunset sherbert family. the cultivar produces dense deeply colored buds with a creamy dessert forward aromatic profile blending bright citrus sweet fruit and rich vanilla cream — signature cookies line character. effects sherbert delivers a comfortable indica leaning experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with relaxing body effects. the high lands steadily and lasts — suitable for late afternoon use evening unwinding or settling in with flavor character intact. a reliable sherbert family cultivar. flavor & aroma on the palate bright citrus up front with sweet fruit through the middle and a creamy dessert finish on the exhale. smoke is silky and unmistakably dessert rich. the terpene profile reads citrus and cream — see the coa for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. lab tested — view the coa every sherbert harvest is third party tested for cannabinoid content terpenes residual solvents pesticides and heavy metals. download the sherbert thca flower certificate of analysis for full test results. tiers explained our three quality tiers are supreme — hand selected top shelf buds with the densest structure highest trichome coverage and strongest terpene expression. preferred — premium grade flower at a balanced price using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. essential — our value tier using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. federally compliant hemp lit farms sherbert thca flower is hemp derived and federally compliant under the 2018 farm bill — containing less than 0.3% δ9 thc by dry weight at harvest. must be 21+ to purchase. not for sale in jurisdictions where thca flower is restricted. explore our full thca flower collection for more strains. citrus fruit indica sweet thca flower lost in translation

toad venom 7g introducing toad venom thca flower by waz good. this balanced hybrid delivers rich creamy sweetness layered with earthy gas sweet funk and subtle citrus creating a bold full bodied smoke with a smooth lingering finish. ◆ bred by ronin ◆ animal face x sin mint ◆ balanced hybrid ◆ boutique provider ◆ premium indoor note this flower is grown indoors producing smaller bud sizes chill euphoric flower waz good

gas gimlet 3.5g (1 8 oz) gas gimlet is an indica dominant hybrid strain bred by wizard trees resulting from a cross between their wizard og and zangria strains. it has a complex terpene profile that balances strong sweet caramel and fruity notes with a distinct gassy undertone. this extremely potent flower comes in at 41% thca! flower indica type 1 flow gardens

moonbow 3.5g (1 8 oz) moonbow also known as “moon bow ” is an evenly balanced hybrid strain (50% indica 50% sativa) created through crossing the potent zkittlez x do si dos strains. this bud has a sweet and flowery berry candy flavor with a punch of sour citrus upon exhale. the aroma is very similar with a fruity berry overtone that's accented by sour citrus and hints of nuttiness too. flower hybrid type 1 flow gardens

frog poison 7g introducing frog poison thca flower by cutright a grower specializing in premium indoor flowers. this indica hybrid packs fruity candy notes with floral earthy sour and tropical layers ◆ indica hybrid ◆ boutique provider ◆ premium indoor note this flower is grown indoors producing smaller bud sizes boutique chill euphoric exclude discounts hybrid indica no 15% flower cutright

zebraz treatz shmediums 14g introducing zebraz thca shmediums by b eazy a local grower specializing in premium indoor flower. this balanced hybrid packs a vibrant blend of sweet candy fruit tropical citrus and creamy sherb notes complemented by subtle earthy gas. these flavorful buds deliver a smooth terpene rich smoke with a rich exotic finish that lingers long after each exhale. ◆ balanced hybrid ◆ top shelf organic indoor chill creative smalls flower beazy

pineapple fruz (limited release) limited release thca flower 1 gram limited release pineapple fruz is a vibrant hybrid strain that delivers a tropical fruity punch with sweet pineapple and citrus flavors. bred for balance this strain offers uplifting yet calming effects that make it perfect for daytime or evening use. dense frosty buds showcase exceptional quality and bag appeal. thca flower pineapple fruz thca flower limited release hybrid tropical fruity pineapple citrus uplifting calming
